'''davazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cebochoerid|cebochoerid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cebochoerid|cebochoerid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| davazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dævæzhæth|dævæzhæth]] || [[word:dævæzhæj|dævæzhæj]] || [[word:dævæzhæsh|dævæzhæsh]] || [[word:dævæzhæ|dævæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:davavazhath|davavazhath]] || [[word:davavazhaj|davavazhaj]] || [[word:davavazhash|davavazhash]] || [[word:davavazha|davavazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:davazhath|davazhath]] || [[word:davazhaj|davazhaj]] || [[word:davazhash|davazhash]] || [[word:davazha|davazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:davafzhath|davafzhath]] || [[word:davafzhaj|davafzhaj]] || [[word:davafzhash|davafzhash]] || [[word:davafzhaf|davafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:davazhatha|davazhatha]] || [[word:davazhaja|davazhaja]] || [[word:davazhasha|davazhasha]] || [[word:davazhaka|davazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:davazhath|davazhath]] || [[word:davazhaj|davazhaj]] || [[word:davazhash|davazhash]] || [[word:davazha|davazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:davazhathal|davazhathal]] || [[word:davazhajal|davazhajal]] || [[word:davazhashal|davazhashal]] || [[word:davazhakal|davazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:davazhathatha|davazhathatha]] || [[word:davazhajaja|davazhajaja]] || [[word:davazhashasha|davazhashasha]] || [[word:davazhaka|davazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:davazhathan|davazhathan]] || [[word:davazhajan|davazhajan]] || [[word:davazhashan|davazhashan]] || [[word:davazhakan|davazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:davazhathaoro|davazhathaoro]] || [[word:davazhajaoro|davazhajaoro]] || [[word:davazhashaoro|davazhashaoro]] || [[word:davazhakaoro|davazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
